name: Wuxi Huadong Heavy Machinery Co., Ltd.
summary: Wuxi Huadong Heavy Machinery Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, markets, and installs container handling equipment in the People's Republic of China. The company offers ship-to-shore container cranes, rail-mounted container gantry cranes, rubber-tired container gantry cranes, general gantry cranes, portal cranes, and other cranes for use in the port container handling operations, railway container handling operations, container yard storage, trailer handling operations, forklift handling operations, etc. It also researches, develops, manufactures, markets, and services automated and intelligent precision processing equipment; and processes and trades in stainless steel products. Wuxi Huadong Heavy Machinery Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Wuxi, the People's Republic of China.
